meta.description: Companies discovered during industry walking — to process later

wind_turbine.name: Vestas
wind_turbine.context: world's largest wind turbine maker, Denmark

smartphone_oem.name: Apple Inc.
smartphone_oem.context: iPhone maker, designs own SoCs (A-series), iOS ecosystem

smartphone_oem.name: Samsung Electronics
smartphone_oem.context: Galaxy phones, also makes OLED displays, DRAM, NAND, image sensors, and SoCs (Exynos)

smartphone_oem.name: Xiaomi
smartphone_oem.context: Chinese smartphone OEM, uses Qualcomm/MediaTek SoCs

smartphone_oem.name: Oppo
smartphone_oem.context: Chinese OEM, BBK Electronics subsidiary, camera-focused phones

smartphone_oem.name: Huawei
smartphone_oem.context: Chinese OEM, designed own Kirin SoCs (HiSilicon), US sanctions impacted chip supply

smartphone_oem.name: OnePlus
smartphone_oem.context: Chinese OEM, BBK subsidiary, uses Qualcomm Snapdragon

smartphone_oem.name: Google (Pixel)
smartphone_oem.context: Makes Pixel phones, designs Tensor SoC with Samsung fab

smartphone_oem.name: Nokia/HMD Global
smartphone_oem.context: Finnish, licenses Nokia brand, uses Qualcomm/MediaTek

smartphone_oem.name: Sony Mobile
smartphone_oem.context: Xperia phones, also major CMOS image sensor maker (Sony Semiconductor)

smartphone_oem.name: ZTE
smartphone_oem.context: Chinese telecom equipment and smartphone maker

smartphone_oem.name: Honor
smartphone_oem.context: Spun off from Huawei 2020, independent smartphone maker

smartphone_oem.name: TCL Technology
smartphone_oem.context: Chinese, makes phones + TVs + displays (CSOT subsidiary)

smartphone_oem.name: Nothing Technology
smartphone_oem.context: UK startup, Qualcomm SoCs, distinctive design

smartphone_oem.name: Transsion Holdings
smartphone_oem.context: Parent of Infinix, Tecno, Itel — dominates African smartphone market

mobile_soc.name: Qualcomm
mobile_soc.context: Snapdragon SoCs, dominant in Android phones, also modems and RF front-end

mobile_soc.name: MediaTek
mobile_soc.context: Dimensity SoCs, #2 mobile chip designer, strong in mid-range

mobile_soc.name: HiSilicon
mobile_soc.context: Huawei subsidiary, designed Kirin SoCs, impacted by US sanctions

mobile_soc.name: Apple (Silicon)
mobile_soc.context: Designs A-series and M-series chips, fabbed at TSMC

mobile_soc.name: Samsung LSI
mobile_soc.context: Designs Exynos SoCs, also fabs chips for others

display_panel.name: Samsung Display
display_panel.context: World's largest OLED maker, supplies Apple iPhone panels

display_panel.name: LG Display
display_panel.context: LCD and OLED panels for phones, TVs, automotive

display_panel.name: BOE Technology
display_panel.context: Chinese display maker, growing OLED capacity, supplies many Android OEMs

display_panel.name: Japan Display Inc (JDI)
display_panel.context: Japanese LCD maker, formerly supplied iPhone LCD panels

cmos_image_sensor.name: Sony Semiconductor Solutions
cmos_image_sensor.context: Dominant image sensor maker (~50% market share), supplies Apple, Samsung, most Android OEMs

cmos_image_sensor.name: Samsung ISOCELL
cmos_image_sensor.context: Samsung's image sensor division, #2 market share

mems_sensors.name: Bosch Sensortec
mems_sensors.context: MEMS accelerometers, gyroscopes, pressure sensors for smartphones

mems_sensors.name: STMicroelectronics
mems_sensors.context: MEMS sensors, also NFC chips, power management ICs

mems_sensors.name: InvenSense (TDK)
mems_sensors.context: MEMS motion sensors, acquired by TDK

rf_components.name: Skyworks Solutions
rf_components.context: RF front-end modules, power amplifiers, filters for smartphones

rf_components.name: Qorvo
rf_components.context: RF filters (BAW/SAW), power amplifiers, smartphone RF front-end

rf_components.name: Broadcom (wireless)
rf_components.context: WiFi/Bluetooth combo chips, also supplies Apple

rf_components.name: Murata Manufacturing
rf_components.context: Japanese, passive components (MLCCs), WiFi modules, SAW filters

audio_ic.name: Cirrus Logic
audio_ic.context: Audio codec ICs, amplifiers — major Apple supplier

cover_glass.name: Corning Inc.
cover_glass.context: Gorilla Glass monopoly — supplies nearly every smartphone maker

cover_glass.name: AGC Inc.
cover_glass.context: Japanese glass maker, Dragontrail cover glass (Gorilla Glass competitor)

cover_glass.name: Schott AG
cover_glass.context: German specialty glass, Xensation cover glass

smartphone_contract_manufacturing.name: Foxconn
smartphone_contract_manufacturing.context: World's largest electronics contract manufacturer, assembles iPhones

smartphone_contract_manufacturing.name: Pegatron
smartphone_contract_manufacturing.context: Taiwanese contract manufacturer, assembles iPhones and other devices

smartphone_contract_manufacturing.name: Wistron
smartphone_contract_manufacturing.context: Taiwanese contract manufacturer, iPhone assembly in India

nfc_chips.name: NXP Semiconductors
nfc_chips.context: Dominant NFC chip maker for smartphones + contactless payments

oled_materials.name: Universal Display Corporation
oled_materials.context: Holds key patents on phosphorescent OLED materials, licenses to Samsung/LG/BOE

oled_materials.name: Idemitsu Kosan
oled_materials.context: Japanese chemical company, major OLED organic materials supplier

oled_materials.name: Novaled
oled_materials.context: Samsung subsidiary, German OLED materials company, charge transport layers

oled_materials.name: Merck KGaA (Display)
oled_materials.context: German chemical company, OLED and LC materials

oled_equipment.name: Canon Tokki
oled_equipment.context: Near-monopoly on OLED vacuum deposition equipment — bottleneck for entire industry

tier1_automotive.name: Robert Bosch GmbH
tier1_automotive.context: World's largest auto parts supplier — ABS, fuel injection, ECUs, sensors, also MEMS

tier1_automotive.name: Continental AG
tier1_automotive.context: German Tier 1 — tires, brakes, ADAS, electronics. Also tire manufacturer.

tier1_automotive.name: ZF Friedrichshafen
tier1_automotive.context: German — transmissions, steering, chassis, EV drivetrains

tier1_automotive.name: Aisin
tier1_automotive.context: Toyota group, transmissions, brakes, body parts

tier1_automotive.name: Magna International
tier1_automotive.context: Canadian — contract manufacturer, mirrors, seating, powertrain. Can build entire vehicles.

tier1_automotive.name: Valeo
tier1_automotive.context: French — thermal systems, visibility (wipers/lights), EV powertrain, ADAS

tier1_automotive.name: BorgWarner
tier1_automotive.context: US — turbochargers, EV drivetrain components, torque transfer

tier1_automotive.name: Aptiv
tier1_automotive.context: US — wiring harnesses, connectors, autonomous driving software

tier1_automotive.name: Yazaki
tier1_automotive.context: Japanese — world's largest wiring harness maker

tire_manufacturer.name: Continental (Tires)
tire_manufacturer.context: German — major tire maker (also Tier 1 supplier)

automotive_glass.name: AGC Inc.
automotive_glass.context: Japanese — world's largest flat glass maker, auto + architectural + display

automotive_glass.name: Fuyao Glass
automotive_glass.context: Chinese — world's largest automotive glass maker, supplies most global OEMs

automotive_glass.name: Saint-Gobain
automotive_glass.context: French — glass, construction materials, major automotive glass supplier

brake_manufacturer.name: Brembo
brake_manufacturer.context: Italian — premium brake systems (calipers, discs, pads)

brake_manufacturer.name: Akebono Brake
brake_manufacturer.context: Japanese — brake pads, calipers, OEM supplier

catalytic_converter.name: Johnson Matthey
catalytic_converter.context: British — catalytic converter catalysts, PGM refining, dominant player

catalytic_converter.name: BASF (Catalysts)
catalytic_converter.context: German chemical giant, also makes catalytic converter catalysts

catalytic_converter.name: Umicore
catalytic_converter.context: Belgian — catalytic converters, battery materials, PGM recycling

automotive_semiconductor.name: Infineon Technologies
automotive_semiconductor.context: German — #1 automotive semiconductor maker, power MOSFETs, MCUs

automotive_semiconductor.name: NXP Semiconductors
automotive_semiconductor.context: Dutch — automotive MCUs, radar, NFC, major auto chip supplier

automotive_semiconductor.name: Renesas Electronics
automotive_semiconductor.context: Japanese — automotive MCUs, SoCs, #3 auto chip maker

automotive_semiconductor.name: Texas Instruments
automotive_semiconductor.context: US — analog/mixed-signal ICs, automotive power management

automotive_semiconductor.name: ON Semiconductor
automotive_semiconductor.context: US — image sensors, power management, automotive focus

solar_panel.name: Jinko Solar
solar_panel.context: Chinese, world's largest solar panel maker by shipments

solar_panel.name: LONGi Green Energy
solar_panel.context: Chinese, largest mono-Si wafer maker, vertically integrated into panels

solar_panel.name: Trina Solar
solar_panel.context: Chinese, top-5 panel maker, also tracker systems

solar_panel.name: First Solar
solar_panel.context: US, only major CdTe thin-film maker, vertically integrated

solar_panel.name: SunPower
solar_panel.context: US, high-efficiency IBC cells, premium residential

solar_panel.name: Tongwei
solar_panel.context: Chinese, major polysilicon producer + solar cells

solar_inverter.name: Huawei (Solar)
solar_inverter.context: World's largest solar inverter maker by shipments

solar_inverter.name: Enphase Energy
solar_inverter.context: US, microinverter pioneer, dominant in residential

container_glass.name: O-I Glass
container_glass.context: World's largest glass container manufacturer. Wine bottles, beer bottles, food jars.

container_glass.name: Verallia
container_glass.context: Major glass packaging producer, spun off from Saint-Gobain. Strong in wine bottles.

container_glass.name: Ardagh Glass Packaging
container_glass.context: Glass and metal packaging. Major wine bottle supplier in Europe.

container_glass.name: Vitro
container_glass.context: Mexican glass manufacturer. Containers, flat glass, automotive glass.

cork.name: Corticeira Amorim
cork.context: World's largest cork producer. ~30% global market share. Portuguese.

cork.name: DIAM Bouchage (Oeneo)
cork.context: French cork/closure producer using DIAMANT process to eliminate TCA taint.

cork.name: Nomacorc (Vinventions)
cork.context: Synthetic cork producer. Plant-based polymer closures.

packaging_machinery.name: Krones AG
packaging_machinery.context: German bottling and packaging technology. Lines for beer, wine, soft drinks.

packaging_machinery.name: Sidel (Tetra Laval)
packaging_machinery.context: PET and glass bottling lines. Part of Tetra Laval group.

packaging_machinery.name: KHS Group
packaging_machinery.context: German filling and packaging technology for beverages.

corrugated_fiberboard.name: Smurfit WestRock
corrugated_fiberboard.context: World's largest corrugated packaging company after 2024 merger.

corrugated_fiberboard.name: International Paper
corrugated_fiberboard.context: Largest pulp and paper company globally. Corrugated packaging, pulp.

pulp_and_paper.name: UPM-Kymmene
pulp_and_paper.context: Finnish pulp, paper, timber company. Major global producer.

pulp_and_paper.name: Stora Enso
pulp_and_paper.context: Finnish-Swedish pulp, paper, biomaterials. One of world's largest.

pulp_and_paper.name: Sappi
pulp_and_paper.context: South African pulp and paper. Speciality papers, packaging.

adhesives.name: Henkel
adhesives.context: German chemical/consumer goods. Adhesives division (Loctite, Technomelt) is world's largest.

adhesives.name: H.B. Fuller
adhesives.context: US adhesives company. Hot melts, labeling adhesives for packaging.

petrochemicals.name: LyondellBasell
petrochemicals.context: One of world's largest plastics, chemicals, refining companies. Major PE, PP producer.

petrochemicals.name: SABIC
petrochemicals.context: Saudi Arabian petrochemicals giant. PE, PP, PVC, ethylene, propylene.

petrochemicals.name: Dow Inc.
petrochemicals.context: Major US chemicals company. Polyethylene, packaging plastics.

petrochemicals.name: INEOS
petrochemicals.context: British chemicals company. Major PVC, PE producer in Europe.

petrochemicals.name: Shin-Etsu Chemical
petrochemicals.context: Japanese chemical company. World's largest PVC producer. Also silicon wafers (MERGE!).

bicycle_component.name: Shimano
bicycle_component.context: World's largest bicycle component manufacturer. Groupsets, brakes, pedals, wheels. Also fishing tackle.

bicycle_component.name: SRAM Corporation
bicycle_component.context: #2 bicycle components. Groupsets, suspension (RockShox), wheels (Zipp). Chicago-based.

bicycle_component.name: Campagnolo
bicycle_component.context: Italian premium bicycle components. Groupsets, wheels. Founded 1933 by Tullio Campagnolo.

bicycle_component.name: Fox Factory
bicycle_component.context: Suspension forks and shocks for MTB and moto. Also powers some automotive suspension.

bicycle_component.name: Magura GmbH
bicycle_component.context: German bicycle hydraulic brakes and suspension forks.

bicycle_manufacturer.name: Trek Bicycle Corporation
bicycle_manufacturer.context: Largest US bicycle manufacturer. Carbon, aluminium, steel frames. Owns Bontrager, Electra.

bicycle_manufacturer.name: Specialized Bicycle Components
bicycle_manufacturer.context: Major US bike brand. Mountain, road, e-bikes. Morgan Hill, CA.

bicycle_manufacturer.name: Cannondale
bicycle_manufacturer.context: US bicycle manufacturer known for aluminium innovation. Part of Dorel/Cycling Sports Group.

bicycle_manufacturer.name: Bianchi
bicycle_manufacturer.context: Oldest bicycle manufacturer (1885). Italian. Famous celeste green color.

bicycle_manufacturer.name: Brompton Bicycle
bicycle_manufacturer.context: British folding bicycle manufacturer. Iconic design. London-made.

bicycle_manufacturer.name: Pinarello
bicycle_manufacturer.context: Italian high-end road bicycles. Tour de France winning frames.

bicycle_manufacturer.name: Giant Manufacturing
bicycle_manufacturer.context: Taiwanese, world's largest bicycle manufacturer by revenue. Makes frames for many brands.

carbon_fiber.name: Toray Industries
carbon_fiber.context: Japanese, world's largest carbon fiber producer (~30% global). Aerospace (Boeing 787), bicycles, automotive.

carbon_fiber.name: Hexcel
carbon_fiber.context: US carbon fiber and composites. Major aerospace supplier (Airbus, Boeing). Also wind turbine blades.

carbon_fiber.name: Mitsubishi Chemical
carbon_fiber.context: Japanese carbon fiber producer. Also chemicals, pharma. Part of Mitsubishi Chemical Group.

carbon_fiber.name: SGL Carbon
carbon_fiber.context: German carbon fiber and graphite products. Automotive (BMW i3), industrial applications.

carbon_fiber.name: Teijin
carbon_fiber.context: Japanese chemical company. Carbon fiber (Tenax brand), aramid fiber (Twaron), polyester.

titanium.name: VSMPO-AVISMA
titanium.context: Russian, world's largest titanium producer. Supplies Boeing, Airbus. Sanctioned post-2022.

titanium.name: Titanium Metals Corporation (TIMET)
titanium.context: US titanium producer. Aerospace, industrial. Subsidiary of Precision Castparts (Berkshire Hathaway).

welding.name: Lincoln Electric
welding.context: World's largest welding equipment/consumables manufacturer. US-based. Cleveland, Ohio.

welding.name: ESAB
welding.context: Swedish-origin welding/cutting equipment. Now part of Enovis. Global presence.

bicycle_tire.name: Continental AG
bicycle_tire.context: German tire giant. Bicycle tires AND automotive tires (MERGE!). Also automotive electronics.

bicycle_tire.name: Vittoria S.p.A.
bicycle_tire.context: Italian bicycle tire specialist. Road and mountain bike tires. Graphene-enhanced.

bicycle_tire.name: Schwalbe (Ralf Bohle GmbH)
bicycle_tire.context: German bicycle tire brand. Marathon, Nobby Nic. Europe's largest bike tire company.

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: Whirlpool Corporation
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: World's largest home appliance maker. Washing machines, dryers, refrigerators. US-based.

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: LG Electronics
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: South Korean electronics/appliances. Washing machines, TVs, OLED panels. Part of LG Group.

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: Samsung Electronics
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: South Korean conglomerate. Washing machines AND semiconductors AND smartphones (massive cross-graph node).

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: Haier Group
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: Chinese, world's largest home appliance brand by sales. Owns GE Appliances, Fisher & Paykel.

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: Electrolux
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: Swedish home appliance maker. Washing machines, vacuum cleaners. #2 in Europe.

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: BSH Hausgeräte
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: German, Bosch-Siemens joint venture. Bosch, Siemens, Gaggenau brands. Major washer maker.

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: Miele
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: German premium home appliance maker. Known for longevity. Family-owned since 1899.

home_appliance_manufacturer.name: Beko (Arçelik)
home_appliance_manufacturer.context: Turkish home appliance brand. Part of Arçelik/Koç Group. Europe's #2 white goods by volume.

laundry_detergent.name: Procter & Gamble
laundry_detergent.context: US consumer goods giant. Tide, Ariel detergents. Massive chemical supply chain.

laundry_detergent.name: Unilever
laundry_detergent.context: Anglo-Dutch consumer goods. Persil, OMO, Surf detergents. Plus food, beauty.

laundry_detergent.name: Church & Dwight
laundry_detergent.context: US consumer products. Arm & Hammer, OxiClean laundry products.

industrial_enzyme.name: Novozymes (Novonesis)
industrial_enzyme.context: Danish, world's largest industrial enzyme producer (~48% global share). Laundry, biofuel enzymes.

industrial_enzyme.name: DSM-Firmenich
industrial_enzyme.context: Dutch-Swiss. Industrial enzymes, nutrition, fragrances. Major detergent enzyme supplier.

solenoid_valve.name: Parker Hannifin
solenoid_valve.context: US, world's largest motion and control technologies company. Solenoid valves, hydraulics, seals.

solenoid_valve.name: Danfoss
solenoid_valve.context: Danish, major valve and drive manufacturer. Solenoid valves, VFDs, compressors.

pump_manufacturer.name: Grundfos
pump_manufacturer.context: Danish, world's largest pump manufacturer. Water pumps, circulation pumps.

pump_manufacturer.name: Xylem Inc.
pump_manufacturer.context: US water technology company. Pumps, treatment, analytics. Spun off from ITT.

cement.name: LafargeHolcim (Holcim)
cement.context: Swiss, world's largest cement and building materials company. Operates in 70 countries.

cement.name: CNBM (China National Building Material)
cement.context: Chinese state-owned, world's largest cement producer by volume.

cement.name: Heidelberg Materials
cement.context: German, #3 cement producer globally. Former HeidelbergCement.

cement.name: Cemex
cement.context: Mexican multinational. #4 cement producer. Concrete, aggregates.

cement.name: UltraTech Cement
cement.context: Indian, largest cement company in India. Part of Aditya Birla Group.

homebuilder.name: D.R. Horton
homebuilder.context: Largest US homebuilder by volume. ~90,000 homes/year.

homebuilder.name: Lennar Corporation
homebuilder.context: #2 US homebuilder. Also financial services, multifamily.

homebuilder.name: China State Construction Engineering
homebuilder.context: Chinese state-owned, world's largest construction company by revenue.

homebuilder.name: Vinci SA
homebuilder.context: French construction and concessions giant. Largest construction company in Europe.

homebuilder.name: Barratt Developments
homebuilder.context: UK's largest housebuilder by volume. ~17,000 homes/year.

hvac.name: Daikin Industries
hvac.context: Japanese, world's largest HVAC manufacturer. Air conditioners, heat pumps, refrigerants.

hvac.name: Carrier Global
hvac.context: US, founded by Willis Carrier (inventor of modern AC). HVAC, refrigeration, fire/security.

hvac.name: Trane Technologies
hvac.context: US/Irish. Trane and Thermo King brands. HVAC and transport refrigeration.

hvac.name: Johnson Controls
hvac.context: US/Irish. Building automation, HVAC, fire/security. York brand.

plumbing_fixtures.name: Masco Corporation
plumbing_fixtures.context: US. Delta faucets, Behr paint, Liberty Hardware. Home improvement products.

plumbing_fixtures.name: Kohler Co.
plumbing_fixtures.context: US. Plumbing fixtures (sinks, toilets, faucets), engines, furniture.

insulation.name: Owens Corning
insulation.context: US. World leader in fiberglass insulation, roofing, composites.

insulation.name: Rockwool International
insulation.context: Danish, world's largest mineral wool insulation manufacturer.

insulation.name: Knauf
insulation.context: German. Drywall, insulation, plasters. Family-owned, one of world's largest.

window_manufacturer.name: Andersen Corporation
window_manufacturer.context: US, largest window and door manufacturer in North America.

window_manufacturer.name: Velux
window_manufacturer.context: Danish, world's largest manufacturer of roof windows and skylights.

lumber.name: Weyerhaeuser
lumber.context: US, largest private owner of timberlands. Lumber, plywood, engineered wood.

lumber.name: West Fraser Timber
lumber.context: Canadian, largest lumber producer in North America after Canfor.

textile_fiber.name: Indorama Ventures
textile_fiber.context: Thai, world's largest PET/polyester producer. Polyester fiber, PET resin, recycling.

textile_fiber.name: Reliance Industries (Textiles)
textile_fiber.context: Indian conglomerate. World's largest polyester fiber producer. Also petrochemicals, refining.

textile_fiber.name: Lenzing AG
textile_fiber.context: Austrian, world leader in wood-based cellulose fibers. Tencel, Modal, viscose.

apparel_manufacturer.name: Nike Inc.
apparel_manufacturer.context: US, world's largest athletic apparel/footwear brand. Massive supply chain across Asia.

apparel_manufacturer.name: Inditex (Zara)
apparel_manufacturer.context: Spanish, world's largest fashion retailer. Zara, Massimo Dutti. Fast fashion pioneer.

apparel_manufacturer.name: H&M Group
apparel_manufacturer.context: Swedish fashion retailer. Second largest globally after Inditex.

apparel_manufacturer.name: PVH Corp
apparel_manufacturer.context: US, owns Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger. Major global apparel company.

apparel_manufacturer.name: Hanesbrands
apparel_manufacturer.context: US, world's largest basics apparel company. Hanes, Champion, Bonds. T-shirts, underwear.

sewing_machine.name: Juki Corporation
sewing_machine.context: Japanese, world's largest industrial sewing machine manufacturer.

sewing_machine.name: Brother Industries
sewing_machine.context: Japanese. Sewing machines, printers, machine tools. Industrial + consumer.

zipper.name: YKK Group
zipper.context: Japanese, world's largest zipper manufacturer (~46% global market). Also architectural products.

synthetic_dye.name: Archroma
synthetic_dye.context: Swiss specialty chemicals. Textile dyes and chemicals. Spun off from Clariant.

synthetic_dye.name: Huntsman Corporation
synthetic_dye.context: US chemicals. Textile dyes/effects, polyurethanes, performance products.

cotton_trading.name: Louis Dreyfus Company
cotton_trading.context: Dutch/French agri commodities trader. Cotton, grains, oilseeds. Global supply chain.

oil_refining.name: ExxonMobil
oil_refining.context: Largest US refiner, integrated oil major

oil_refining.name: Saudi Aramco
oil_refining.context: World's largest oil company by production

fertilizer.name: Nutrien
fertilizer.context: World's largest potash producer, major fertilizer

shipbuilding.name: Daewoo Shipbuilding
shipbuilding.context: Korean Big 3 shipbuilder (now HD Hyundai subsidiary)

marine_engine.name: Wärtsilä
marine_engine.context: Finnish marine engines and power plants

container_crane.name: ZPMC
container_crane.context: Shanghai — world's largest port crane manufacturer

container_terminal.name: PSA International
container_terminal.context: Singapore port operator, global terminal network

container_terminal.name: Hutchison Ports
container_terminal.context: Hong Kong — world's leading port operator

vaccine_specialist.name: Serum Institute of India
vaccine_specialist.context: World's largest vaccine manufacturer by doses

pharma_packaging.name: Gerresheimer
pharma_packaging.context: Glass vials, syringes, drug delivery devices
